title: Iliad, Book 14: The Deception of Zeus
description: Book 14 of Homer's Iliad: The Deception of Zeus.
introduction: Book 14 of the Iliad: The Deception of Zeus. The Greek text is from the Venetus A manuscript (10th century), the oldest complete manuscript of the Iliad.

translation.original_text: Νέστορα δ᾿ οὐκ ἔλαθεν ἰαχὴ πίνοντά περ ἔμπης.
translation.text: Hera saw Zeus watching the battle and devised a plan. She borrowed Aphrodite's girdle and seduced Zeus on Mount Ida. While he slept, Poseidon rallied the Greeks, and they drove Hector back, stunning him with a stone.
